{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heart-Piercer Fruit
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heart-Piercer Fruit]] comes from a tree that blooms once a year in [[Ninecloud City]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Consuming]] the [[Heart-Piercer Fruit]] provides the lifespan of an [[Archlord]] as an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Heart-Piercer Fruit]] has made [[Yerin]]'s lifeline thicker.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“It comes from one tree that blooms once a year in a single garden in Ninecloud City.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“With just this fruit, you would have the lifespan of an Archlord as an Underlord.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
